basic_details.job_title: CMO Hathras Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical Office Hathras (CMO Hathras) Medical Officer (Contractual) Notification 2026 has been released on 30 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the CMO Hathras Medical Officer (Contractual) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

qualification.details: Medical Officer (Contract): MBBS Emergency Medical Officer Female (Contract): MBBS

salary_details.pay_scale: 80000/- + 20000 PBI per month to 100000/- per month
salary_details.details: Medical Officer (Contract): Rs. 80000/- + Rs. 20000 PBI per month Medical Officer (Contract): Rs. 100000/- per month Emergency Medical Officer Female (Contract): Rs. 100000/- per month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CMO Hathras Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Medical Officer (Contractual) posts at Chief Medical Office Hathras is scheduled for 10 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Medical Officer posts is 65 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree to be eligible for the Medical Officer (Contractual) positions announced by CMO Hathras.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Medical Officer (Contractual) posts?
faq.answer: A total of 13 vacancies are available for the Medical Officer (Contractual) positions. These include various roles such as Medical Officer (Contract) and Emergency Medical Officer Female (Contract).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Medical Officer posts varies. Some positions offer Rs. 80000/- + Rs. 20000 PBI per month, while others offer Rs. 100000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the CMO Hathras Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates who perform well in the interview and clear document verification will be considered for the posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Chief Medical Office Hathras. The specific venue address and reporting time will be detailed in the official notification.
